/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared  -o internetcontrol.so CMakeFiles/internetcontrol.dir/internetcontrol_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/internetcontrol.dir/src/InternetControlPlugin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/internetcontrol.dir/internetcontrol_autogen/UVLADIE3JM/qrc_resources.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/veyon /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/veyon/libveyon-core.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
